name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
Left(i) == (i + N - 1) \mod N
Right(i) == (i + 1) \mod N

(* State predicates *)
ForksOK == \A i \in 0..N-1: forks[i] \in 0..N-1
StatesOK == \A i \in 0..N-1: states[i] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks == [i \in 0..N-1 |-> i]
        /\ states = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E i \in 0..N-1:
          /\ states[i] = "thinking"
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = i
          /\ forks[Left(i)] = Left(i)
          /\ forks[Right(i)] = Right(i)
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks[i] = i
          /\ forks[Left(i)] = i
          /\ forks[Right(i)] = i
          /\ states[i] = "thinking"

(* Invariant *)
TypeOK == ForksOK /\ StatesOK

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = 0
      /\ flag = <<>>


Next == /\ num' = num + 1
      /\ flag' = Append(flag, 0)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ Len(q) = 0
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1

Producer == /\ Len(q) < K
           /\ head' = head + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ q' = Append(q, head)

Consumer == /\ Len(q) > 0
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = tail + 1
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = {}
  /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
  \/ \E newTerm \in Nat :
       /\ state = "Follower"
       /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
       /\ votedFor' = {}
       /\ state' = "Follower"
  \/ \E newTerm \in Nat :
       /\ state = "Candidate"
       /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
       /\ votedFor' = {}
       /\ state' = "Candidate"
  \/ \E newTerm \in Nat :
       /\ state = "Leader"
       /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
       /\ votedFor' = {}
       /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                 /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in 1..10 : r \in readers
              /\ writer_active' = TRUE
                 /\ readers' = <<>>
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ \E r \in 1..10 : r \in readers
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                 /\ readers' = <<>>
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ \E r \in 1..10 : r \notin readers
              /\ writer_active' = TRUE
                 /\ readers' = <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in 1..N -> 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in 1..N -> 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]
        \/ /\ token' = token
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]
        \/ /\ token' = token
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
          \/ /\ \E k \in Keys: /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = store[k]]
TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES clocks, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
        /\ epsilon \in Nat

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + delta[i]]
          /\ delta[i] \in [-maxDrift..maxDrift]
        /\ \A i \in 1..N :
              /\ clocks'[i] = (1/N) * Sum(j \in 1..N : clocks[j])
              /\ \E j \in 1..N :
                    /\ clocks'[j] = (1/N) * Sum(k \in 1..N : clocks[k])
        /\ \A i \in 1..N :
              /\ clocks'[i] \in Int
        /\ \A i, j \in 1..N :
              /\ clocks'[i] - clocks'[j] \in [-epsilon..epsilon]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, epsilon>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn[1] = 1
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn[2] = 2
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn[1] = 2
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn[2] = 1
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Clients, Pages

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
       /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Clients :
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
       \/ \E c \in Clients :
          /\ c \in Pages
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ allocated \subseteq [Clients -> SUBSET Pages]
          /\ \A c \in Clients : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

        /\ wants \in {0,1}

Next == 
  \/ /\ turn = 0
     /\ wants = 1
     /\ turn' = 1
     /\ wants' = 0
  \/ /\ turn = 1
     /\ wants = 0
     /\ turn' = 0
     /\ wants' = 1
  \/ /\ turn' = turn
     /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>
